# Advit Hub — llms.txt
# This file helps LLMs understand the structure and content of advithub.in.
# More info: https://llmstxt.org/

# About
Advit Hub is an education-first innovation ecosystem where students learn real skills, build live projects, and grow into industry-ready professionals.

# Core pages
- Home: https://advithub.in/
- Courses: https://advithub.in/courses
- Contact: https://advithub.in/contact

# What we offer
- IT & Software Development
- Web Development
- App Development
- Cloud Engineering
- DevOps & Automation
- AI & Machine Learning
- Digital Marketing
- Content Creation
- UI/UX Design
- Business Technology
- System Design
- Data & Databases

# Key differentiators
- Learn: Practical, industry-relevant skills through structured training and mentorship
- Build: Live projects, freelance work, and internal product development
- Work: Real codebases, real teams, real client work
- Get Placed: Direct pipeline from learning to earning

# Contact
- Email: contact@advithub.in
- Website: https://advithub.in
